_meta.bundle: Asset Verification — bank statements + brokerage + retirement
_meta.purpose: Lender must verify the borrower has (a) enough liquid reserves for down payment + closing costs + 2-6 months PITI cushion, and (b) the funds are seasoned (60+ days in account) and traceable (no undocumented large deposits = anti-money-laundering hygiene).

chase_checking_4521.notes: All deposits are payroll. No flagged transactions for AML/BSA review.

marcus_savings_8910.notes: Stable balance — borrower drips small amounts in. Acceptable for down payment + reserves.

fidelity_brokerage_2245.notes: Per Fannie Mae B3-4.3-01: stocks/bonds counted at 70-100% depending on volatility. Here 90% applied to broad-index ETFs (VTI, VOO, BND). Available for down payment if liquidated; lender requires liquidation evidence before close.

fidelity_401k_5570.notes: Per Fannie Mae B3-4.3-03: retirement assets counted at 60% (accounts for taxes + 10% early-withdrawal penalty). NOT being used for down payment here — kept as reserves cushion.

earnest_money_deposit.notes: Standard 2-3% earnest money to demonstrate good-faith intent. Already part of borrower's $200K down payment.

summary.verdict: Far in excess of required minimums.
